name: tts_widget
title: Text-to-Speech Tutorial
description: Learn how to convert PDF text to audio files

steps.text:
📁 Add PDFs for Text-to-Speech

Select PDF files containing text that you want to convert to audio. Works best with text-based PDFs (not scanned images).

📂 Batch Audio Generation

Convert multiple documents at once! Scan Directory adds all PDFs from a folder, perfect for creating audio versions of document collections.

📝 Text Source Files

Your PDF files are listed here. The tool will extract readable text from these files for speech conversion. File order determines playback sequence.

🗑️ Remove Selected Files

Don't need some files? Select them in the list and remove them before generating audio.

🎵 Generate Audio

Convert your PDF text to an audio file! Perfect for listening on the go, accessibility needs, or multitasking. The audio preserves document structure and formatting.
